name: IBOKIN Co.,Ltd.
summary: IBOKIN Co.,Ltd., a recycling company, provides demolition, environment, metal, and automobile recycling services in Japan. The company also engages in ferrous and non-ferrous materials recycling; industrial waste disposal business; and generation and separation of waste. In addition, it offers dismantling, removal, collection, transportation, intermediate treatment, and final disposal services. Further, the company is also engaged in plastic pellets manufacturing; and buying, selling, and lending of highly managed medical equipment. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Tatsuno, Japan.
